 Vi arbetar hybrid vilket innebär arbete på kontoret varvat med distansarbete. I rollen kommer du att rapportera till gruppchef IT Test- & Utvecklingsstöd.
   

  

**För att lyckas i rollen**
 Vi ser att du har flerårig erfarenhet som Azure DevOps Specialist eller liknande tekniska roller. Du har en god förståelse för Azure DevOps som plattform och är van vid att arbeta med YAML, Git, PowerShell och C#. För att lyckas har du erfarenhet av att bygga och underhålla CI/CT/CD-pipelines samt att arbeta med pakethantering, feeds och automatiserade flöden.
   

  

 Det är viktigt att du har jobbat enligt agila metoder, gärna inom ramverket SAFe där samarbete, struktur och förändring går hand i hand. Du har dessutom ett genuint intresse för DevSecOps och en vilja att både förenkla och förbättra inte bara koden, utan även processer och arbetssätt. Ett grundkrav är att du kan svenska flytande både i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Meriterande för rollen är om du har erfarenhet av molntjänster i Azure, hantering av containerplattformar och testautomatisering.
   

  

 Som person ser vi att du är teamorienterad, kommunikativ och engagerad. Du delar gärna med dig av din kunskap, är nyfiken på ny teknik och har ett lösningsfokuserat sätt att ta dig an arbetsuppgifter. Du är ödmjuk i din expertis och trygg i att ta en rådgivande roll gentemot andra team.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Vi jobbar med löpande urval så tveka inte att skicka in din ansökan redan idag. I ansökan kommer vi att ställa ett antal urvalsfrågor som ligger till grund för urvalet.
   

  

 Läs mer om hela vår rekryteringsprocess här.
   

  

 Vi kommer att återkoppla till alla som söker oavsett om du går vidare eller inte.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kring rollen vänligen ta kontakt med rekryterande chef Izabella Rolnik på izabella.rolnik@skandia.se.
   

  

 Om du har frågor kopplat till rekryteringsprocess, vänligen ta kontakt med Talent Acquisition Partner Nina Fazeli på nina.fazeli@skandia.se
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**Mer om IT**
 Vi på Skandia IT är stolta över att vara en kundorienterad enhet som levererar effektiva och säkra lösningar för våra kunder. Med cirka 600 engagerade medarbetare är vi mitt i en spännande transformationsresa, där vi utvecklas tillsammans och har kul på vägen. Framåt tillsammans är vårt motto!
   

  

 Vi arbetar agilt och har sedan 2017 använt oss av SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) ramverket, där leverans och kundvärde alltid står i centrum. Våra tågledningar och team, jobbar verksamhetsbaserat med aktiviteter som sprintplanering, daily stand-ups, team-synk, code reviews och retrospektiv.
   

  

 Var 12:e vecka samlas vi alla i vår ljusa och inspirerande Ljusgård på kontoret i Stockholm för 2 planeringsdagar. Planeringsperioden består av 6 tvåveckorssprintar, där den sista sprinten är en innovationssprint. Här får du chansen att, själv eller tillsammans med ditt team, utveckla och förfina våra system.

title: Senior IT Architect - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies. Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for Senior IT Architects to help our clients on national and international projects! (Senior) IT Architects are part of our consulting teams who focus for instance on tech-oriented analyses, review & specification of IT systems or architectures, technical solution design, process improvement and target architecture definitions. Together with colleagues from BCG Platinion and/or the Boston Consulting Group, you will develop superior IT strategies, concepts, and solutions actively and on site, applying your technical know-how combined with your analytical and conceptual skillset. Based on your IT project experience, you are able to provide content guidance to and coordinate smaller teams.
   

  

 What You'll Bring
   

  

**You can help us make a difference if you**
* completed a university degree in computer science, informatics, engineering, or a related discipline with higher-than-average grades
* bring a minimum of four years relevant experience in IT consulting, management of IT projects, or professional software development
* have led project teams of more than three people
* know that modern tools, such as machine learning, cyber resilience, DevOps, agile methods, AI, and robotics aren't just buzzwords - but essential to sustainable IT architectures
* are familiar with popular software development methods and tools
* feel particularly comfortable in interdisciplinary teams and global contexts - while traveling to our clients in- and outside of your home country
* are on a fluent level of understanding and communicating complex topics in English


 Who You'll Work With
   

  

**Shape the world of tomorrow**
* You will form the digital transformation of globally leading companies, ensuring their success by evaluating our clients' digital capabilities and performing feasibility studies
* You will manage small, agile development teams in strategic IT implementation programs, establish modern practices like DevOps and CI/CD, and be responsible for the technical implementation of crucial digital requirements, such as cyber resilience
* You will analyze, develop, and optimize cutting-edge, customized IT architectures while leading small teams and applying your comprehensive understanding of legacy IT, enterprise solutions, and current market developments and trends such as cloud computing and microservices


 Additional info
   

  

**How To Grow With Us**
 We guarantee constant development incentives in an open and rewarding work environment! Together with a dedicated team of talented colleagues, you get to work on new challenges every day. Individual training offers and a culture of open feedback will provide the framework needed to explore and perfect personal strengths. Our modern structures allow focusing on the essence of our work - with easy travel booking, an excellent back-office support and comprehensive Knowledge Center. With our regular office Fridays and legendary events, we cultivate a strong and close team network beyond our case work.
   

  

*BCG Platinion is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable.*
*#BCGPlatinion*
 Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.
   

  

 BCG is an E - Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E-Verify.

title: Agentic AI Cloud Engineer (Cloud & Custom Applications)
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

**Din roll**
 Som Agentic AI Cloud Engineer arbetar du i kärnan av Capgeminis satsning på cloud‑native agentiska lösningar. Du kommer att orkestrera autonoma agentiska AI-system på moderna molnplattformar som GCP (Gemini Enterprise, Vertex AI, CCAI) och AWS (Bedrock Agents, AgentCore, Amazon Q Business, Strands). Rollen är tekniskt djup och innebär att du designar, bygger och optimerar agentarkitekturer som fungerar robust, säkert och skalbart i molnet. Du arbetar nära kunder och interna team för att förstå behov, skapa intelligenta agentbeteenden och implementera lösningar som är redo för verkliga driftmiljöer. Eftersom området växer snabbt får du stor möjlighet att påverka hur vi utvecklar och använder agentisk AI på våra hyperscalerplattformar.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Arbeta praktiskt med cloud‑native agentisk AI från behovsanalys till design, byggnation och konfigurering av agentlösningar byggda på GCP Gemini, Vertex AI, CCAI/CES och AWS Bedrock Agents, AgentCore, Strands och Amazon Q Business.
* Testa, optimera och införa autonoma agentmodeller i drift, och säkerställa att de fungerar robust, säkert och skalbart i molnbaserade hyperscaler‑miljöer.
* Bidra med teknisk expertis inom agentarkitektur, molntjänster, integrationer och generativ AI, samt stötta initiativ som driver Capgeminis hyperscaler‑agenda inom GCP och AWS.
* Ta fram tekniska designförslag för cloud‑native agentlösningar och förklara på ett tydligt sätt hur agenternas logik, funktioner och krav påverkar implementationen i GCP‑ eller AWS‑miljöer.


**Din profil**
* Praktisk erfarenhet av cloud‑native AI‑utveckling i GCP och/eller AWS, gärna med tekniker som Gemini Enterprise, Vertex AI, CCAI/CES, Bedrock Agents, AgentCore, Strands eller Amazon Q Business.
* Djup teknisk förståelse för AI‑modeller, agentarkitekturer och hur autonoma agenter designas, optimeras och körs stabilt i molnmiljöer.
* Erfarenhet att programmera och bygga lösningar i AWS eller GCP som är drivna av agentisk AI
* Flytande kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Möjligheten att arbeta med modern cloud‑native AI‑teknik och starka kundcase inom agentiska lösningar baserade på bland annat GCP Gemini, Vertex AI, AWS Bedrock Agents, AgentCore och Strands.
* Ett område med stark framfart där det finns stort engagemang internt och där agentisk AI i molnet är ett prioriterat strategiskt fokus.
* Ett tekniskt kompetent team där du får utveckla molnbaserade agentlösningar som skapar verklig nytta och där du som specialist får utrymme att påverka, fördjupa dig och bygga framtidens cloud‑native AI‑arkitektur.


**Ansökan**
*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro för 2024.
   

  

**Make it real |** 
 www.capgemini.com

title: Senior/Lead Developer – Dynamics 365 CE (On-Premises & Cloud)
description:
As of 2 September 2025, Vivicta, former Tietoevry Tech Services, now operates as a standalone company under our new brand. We’ve officially launched Vivicta, your trusted Nordic transformation partner, making everyday easier through technology. You can explore more about our brand and what we stand for at https://www.vivicta.com
   

  

 Ready to join us? Click ‘Apply’ and complete our short application form to get started. Prefer another option? Apply via LinkedIn to automatically populate your details using your profile.
   

  

 Vi söker en erfaren utvecklare till Vivicta, där du blir anställd som konsult och arbetar i långsiktiga uppdrag hos Stockholms stad, en av våra största kunder. Rollen innebär avancerad utveckling i våra befintliga on‑premises‑baserade CRM‑system, samtidigt som du har kompetens att arbeta i moderna molnplattformar inför en framtida migrering.
   

  

**När du börjar hos Vivicta som Lead/Senior utvecklare inom Dynamics 365 kommer du att**
* Utveckla och vidareutveckla Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Service i on‑premises‑miljöer.
* Lösa komplexa tekniska problem med stor verksamhetspåverkan.
* Samarbeta proaktivt med verksamhet genom hela utvecklingsprocessen.
* Prioritera krav tillsammans med kund och bidra till tekniska vägval.
* Leda och stötta team i tekniska frågor.


**Vem vi söker**
* Du har mycket god kompetens inom on‑premises‑utveckling (Dynamics 365 / CRM).
* Erfarenhet av integrations- och systemutveckling i lokala servermiljöer (ej molnberoende).
* Förmåga att utveckla i molnbaserade lösningar (Power Platform / Dynamics 365 Online) inför kommande migreringar.
* Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsorienterad.
* Du är flytande i svenska, i tal och skrift (obligatoriskt vid arbete med offentlig sektor och Stockholms stad).


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet från kommunal eller statlig verksamhet.
* Erfarenhet av att leda eller koordinera utvecklingsteam.


**Varför Vivicta?**
 Hos oss får du mer än bara ett uppdrag. Som utvecklare på Vivicta blir du en del av ett team som kombinerar hög teknisk kompetens, stor påverkan i samhällsviktiga projekt och en prestigelös kultur där vi alltid stöttar varandra.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära våra kunder inom Stockholms stad och offentlig sektor och får möjlighet att bidra till lösningar som gör verklig skillnad för medborgare samtidigt som du utvecklas tekniskt inom både on‑premises och moderna molnplattformar.
   

  

 Vi är ett bolag där kvalitet, förtroende och laganda går först. Här får du frihet, ansvar och utrymme att växa och möjligheten att vara med och forma framtidens CRM‑lösningar i en digitalt föränderlig offentlig sektor.
   

  

**Blev du inspirerad?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Bifoga ditt CV eller LinkedIn-profil så kontaktar vi dig. Intervjuer kommer att hållas löpande, så vi uppmanar dig att söka redan idag. Om du har några frågor angående denna roll, vänligen kontakta anställande chef, Linda Tärnström, linda.tarnstrom@vivicta.com.
   

  

 Hoppas vi hörs snart!

title: Digital and AI Consultant
description:
**Digital and AI Consultant**
-----------------------------

  

We are looking for a Digital and AI Consultant, with a sharp analytical mind, who is convinced that new AI solutions can create real business value when based on profound human insights and future scenarios.


The role is based at our Stockholm office, but you will work internationally with colleagues and clients.

**The role**
------------


We are looking for someone who wants to be at the absolute forefront of how companies use AI in strategy and business development - from identifying insights and business opportunities, to leading the way in AI applications that help the company grow.


In the role of Digital and AI Consultant at Lynxeye, you will, together with our AI Skills Leader and Head of Product, be responsible for strengthening Lynxeye’s AI offering and ways of working.


You will work on both internal projects to ensure our organization has enough expertise to use AI efficiently, as well as in client projects, forging new ways for companies to deliver the best experience possible. Not only will your work shape Lynxeye’s AI path going forward, but this role also offers a great opportunity to work with C-level executives and make a meaningful impact on the future of leading brands and international companies.


The key objective is to learn and be updated on the latest developments and trends, while creating new solutions and products based on existing LLM, AI and ML models, that can be implemented within the organization, or packaged for clients.


All consultants at Lynxeye work in close collaboration with our clients in projects, and you will work together with a team of strategic, creative and analytic experts. As Lynxeye is part of Eraneos Group, you will also be able to collaborate and learn from the award winning Eraneos AI team in Germany.

### **Key responsibilities**

* **AI expertise**: Have and maintain a solid understanding of how AI products function at a technical level, keeping up with global developments in our field.
* **AI products**: Build AI products and tools that help us, and our clients, move forward and find direction in a chaotic world.
* **AI rollout**: Identify what is needed to shift habits and create benefits while implementing AI within organizations.
* **AI projects**: Manage and structure new AI projects effectively, from initial proposal through completion, and help deliver them together with our teams.

**You**
-------


At Lynxeye, we share a passion for making companies understand how they can make a difference for people, businesses and society. We believe you share that passion with us. You’re a fan of learning by doing and want to contribute with curious questions, unique perspectives and bright ideas.


To be successful in this role, you need high analytical capacity, ability to balance critical thinking with a solution-oriented mindset, and strong motivation for problem-solving and creating results. You have a strong interest in leveraging AI for business development, a willingness to forge a way forward in new dynamic environments, and a desire to see companies evolve. In addition, you enjoy building strong client relationships and thrive in a fast, dynamic, and innovative environment.


This is a new and independent role at Lynxeye, therefore you are expected to have a proactive and innovative way of working as well as a strong ability to grasp basic concepts around data and the flow of information.

* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree within relevant field for consulting or software engineering.
* 2+ years of experience working with software development, possibly as a full-stack developer within business systems and data sources.
* Basic knowledge in JavaScript, Python and SQL.
* Basic knowledge of hosting and cloud deployment.
* Basic understanding of brand strategy, growth strategy and/or corporate direction.
* Business proficient in written and spoken Swedish and English.
* It is considered a plus if you have experience building tools in a Microsoft environment such as Copilot, Teams, SharePoint, Azure, etc.

**Apply now!**
--------------


If you feel you’re the person we are looking for, don’t hesitate to apply today. The preferred start date is as soon as possible, but we are flexible for the right candidate.

**About Lynxeye**
-----------------


At Lynxeye, we make your business and brands matter. We are a high-end management consultancy for bold leaders ready to turn change into growth. Over 25 years, we have proudly instilled more than 500 companies with the confidence to act on their next opportunity. We partner with diverse clients globally, united by a shared passion for transformative change and progress in their industries. Lynxeye is a member of Eraneos Group.

title: Global Pocess Owner - Record to Report
description:
**Your Tasks:**


As the Global Process Owner Record to Report you own the end-to-end process from general ledger, close, consolidation to reporting across all entities and our Financial Shared Service Center closely partnering with diverse teams in a matrix-organized partnership throughout the BearingPoint landscape worldwide. You are a highly visible strategic decision-maker responsible for process harmonization, standardization, and documentation to continuously improve quality, efficiency and effectiveness, strongly aligning with our internal controls’ framework and applicable accounting rules. In particular, your responsibilities include the following:

* You analyze, define, harmonize and standardize the record-to-report processes across all entities and the financial shared service centre and drive digitalization and automation initiatives to boost process performance.
* You maintain audit-proven documentation and enable all stakeholders through guidelines, best practices and training for process compliance and quality.
* You are the key touchpoint for all process-related questions.
* You define the record-to-report related business requirements, approve developed solutions, and support during the roll-out phases in our current transition from SAP R/3 to SAP S/4 Professional Services on a Public Cloud.
* You support the continuous updating and further development of the firmwide IFRS Accounting Manual, acting as a main point of contact for queries relating to its application and interpretation, particularly with regard to revenue recognition.
* In this role, you report to the Head of Firmwide Accounting.

**Your Profile:**

* Master's degree in a relevant business field and at least 6 years of experience in accounting, controlling, and/or auditing.
* Ability to structure, develop and document end-to-end accounting and closing processes.
* Process expertise in SAP S/4 HANA and a strong understanding of IFRS.
* Expertise in Signavio and process mining or automation is a strong plus.
* Strong communication and change management skills
* Fluent in English. German and/or French are an advantage.


This full-time, permanent position is available immediately at any of our Amsterdam, Bucharest, Dublin, Milano, Oslo, Paris, Stockholm, Vienna, Berlin, Duesseldorf, Frankfurt or Munich offices.


You will be part of an international team, but also have local colleagues within internal finance at your local office. You will be expected to travel.

**What now?**


Upload your CV, cover letter, and academic transcripts from higher education in our system. We review applications on a rolling basis and will invite qualified candidates to interview as soon as possible.


During the interview process, you will meet various colleagues from the team and conduct case interviews.
company_description: BearingPoint ist eine unabhängige Management- und Technologieberatung mit europäischen Wurzeln und globaler Reichweite.

title: Platform Architect
description:
Stories have the power to make the ordinary extraordinary. They help us think bigger, see beyond ourselves, and deepen our connection with others.


As one of the world’s leading audiobook and e-book streaming platforms, Storytel brings unlimited listening to millions of users across 25 markets. Driven by our purpose “Leading the future of storytelling, we move the world through stories”, Storytel Group inspires and entertains people around the world by blending innovation with tradition. We bring stories to life across various formats for everyone to discover. Anytime. Anywhere.

 **Ready for your next chapter? We’re looking for a** **Platform Architect** **- Sweden to join the team in Stockholm!**

**About the Role**


We are looking for a high-impact Platform Architect to drive the evolution of our complex IT & financial operations.


In this role you will be the driving force behind a robust technical strategy that ensures our IT & financial systems are scalable, secure, and automated. You will act as a trusted advisor to non-technical system owners, translating business needs into a clear, ambitious technical roadmap.


This is a high-autonomy role for someone who wants to architect the agentic, AI-driven future of finance operations.

**What You'll Do**
------------------


At the essence of this role is:

* Ownership: Define, own and drive the architectural vision for our financial ecosystem. You will ensure our systems (Netsuite, Anaplan, Aaro, Looker, etc.) are integrated and automated to ensure that they support our business goals of fast and accurate financial reporting, and support an agentic future.
* Partner: Be the go-to technical advisor for system owners and leaders in Finance, Tech, Publishing, and beyond. Translate complexity into clarity, and make sure technical decisions serve business outcomes.
* Modernization. You are expected to drive modernization efforts of our financial systems and be a self starter with a vision.

**What We're Looking For**
--------------------------


We believe that you have:

* Deep technical foundation in software engineering and cloud infrastructure. Experience with financial systems (NetSuite, fintech platforms, ERP integrations) is a strong plus.
* Business fluency. You see technology as a means to an end.
* High agency. You spot problems, define the solution, and move. Permission isn't a prerequisite.
* Excellent communicator. Equally comfortable explaining API design to a CFO and compliance requirements to an engineer.
* Pragmatism. You balance long-term architectural integrity with the realities of a fast-moving business.

**Qualifications**
------------------

* 8+ years in software engineering and system architecture
* Proven experience scaling enterprise financial systems
* Track record leading cross-functional initiatives with diverse stakeholders
* Strong grasp of data governance, security, and compliance (GDPR, ITGC)
* Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent experience

### **Join a world of stories**


At Storytel, we’re a team of creative story lovers who thrive on collaboration and new ideas. Our workplace is friendly, dynamic, and full of opportunities to experiment and make an impact. We believe in trust, flat hierarchies, and empowering you to grow with us.


Does this sound like your next story? Simply fill out the application form and share your CV or LinkedIn profile – no cover letter needed. Answer a few questions, and you’re all set.

title: Data Scientist
description:
For our client Volvo Cars, we are looking for a **Data Scientist.**


The Vehicle Propulsion and Energy Data Analytics team analyzes data related to high voltage batteries, vehicle charging, and electric drive to gain insight into how our products work and ensure the customer experience gets better every day. Your contribution will focus specifically on high voltage batteries, improving the quality of our cars by bringing better and faster feedback to our developers and product designers.


We are a tight-knit group with a friendly and enthusiastic team spirit . We have many clear, concrete, and inspiring opportunities within our team and organization to apply your data science skills.

**What You’ll Do**


You will perform statistical analyses of fleet data to help stakeholders gain better insight into vehicle behavior. You will use machine learning and statistics to make predictive models for vehicle systems, and visualization techniques to present complex results to stakeholders in a clear and understandable way.


You will also write code in Python, review and give feedback on your colleagues’ code, construct dashboards, and enable automated, continuous feedback on software and hardware quality.

**Who are You?**


We love what we do, and we think it’s important that you do too. You should be eager to learn and develop your knowledge and skillset, and support others with their personal and professional growth as well. You must be open to ideas from others, even when they may be less experienced than you – we value both ambition and humility!

**Key Competencies**

* Exploratory and confirmatory data analysis
* Pyspark, SQL, and ETL pipelines
* Visualization tools (specifically matplotlib and seaborn)
* Ability to write clean, readable code in Python that follows best practices
* Scientific computing libraries (e.g. numpy, scipy, pandas, polars)
* Basic proficiency with git
* Computing platforms such as Databricks and Jupyter

**Meritorious**

* Experience within the automotive and diagnostics domain
* Experience in high voltage battery design, analytics, assembly, or repair
* Machine learning and statistical modeling
* Developing software with Linux systems
* Cloud technologies such as Azure and AWS

title: Full-stack Automation Engineer
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**


We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.


Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.

 **THE ROLE**


Join our Data Team as a Full-stack Automation Engineer with strong experience in workflow orchestration using n8n (or similar tools) and a growing capability in building agent-driven, full-stack applications.


You will design and build scalable automations that connect core business systems (ecommerce, CRM, data platforms), while also experimenting with AI-native and agentic workflows that move beyond traditional rule-based automation.

**WHAT YOU'LL DO:**


You’ll work across automation, AI, and full‑stack development, including:

**Designing and maintaining complex workflows using n8n**

* API integrations, event‑driven flows, data transformations, error handling, observability

**Building integrations across core systems, such as:**

* Ecommerce platforms (e.g. WooCommerce, Shopify)
* CRM, marketing tools, and internal APIs
* Data platforms (warehouses, pipelines, event streams)

**Developing agentic and AI‑driven workflows**

* Using LLM APIs to enable decision‑making automations
* Implementing multi‑step reasoning flows where agents interact with tools and APIs
* Combining automation and AI to reduce manual operational work

**Contributing to full‑stack development**

* Backend services in Node.js and/or Python
* Frontend components (React or similar) for internal tools
* API design and integration layers

**Ensuring scalability and reliability**

* Performance tuning, monitoring, logging, and alerting
* Versioning, deployment, and maintenance of workflows

**Collaborating cross‑functionally**

* Translating business processes into automated solutions
* Identifying opportunities for automation and AI augmentation together with data, product, and engineering teams

**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:**


We value both technical expertise and cultural fit. You enjoy collaborating, experimenting, and building solutions that make a real impact.

**Required experience:**

* 5+ years of software development experience, with 2+ years focused on workflow automation
* Hands‑on experience with automation tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make, Boomi, or similar
* Strong experience with API integrations (REST, webhooks, OAuth)
* Solid programming skills in JavaScript/TypeScript (preferred) and/or Python
* Experience contributing to full‑stack applications, including backend APIs and basic frontend work (React, Next.js, or similar)
* Familiarity with databases (PostgreSQL, NoSQL), cloud platforms (AWS preferred), and Git‑based workflows

**Nice to Have:**

* Experience working with LLMs and AI tooling (e.g. OpenAI APIs, LangChain, LangGraph)
* Exposure to agentic or autonomous systems
* Understanding of data pipelines, ETL, or event‑driven architectures
* Experience within ecommerce or martech environments

**WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:**

* Business processes are reliably automated end‑to‑end
* Manual operations are reduced through smart workflows
* AI‑driven automations move beyond static rules
* Systems are scalable, observable, and easy to maintain

**WHY THIS ROLE IS INTERESTING:**


This is not a traditional automation role. You’ll be working at the intersection of:

* Workflow automation
* Full‑stack engineering
* AI‑driven and agentic systems


...helping evolve from simple integrations to intelligent, autonomous workflows.

**WHAT WE OFFER**


We are a value driven company with our values *We team up*, *Innovation Drives Us*, *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* and *Going the Extra Mile* at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.


Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings

 **SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**


If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!


Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.

  

If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Frontend/backend/fullstack
description:
Vi har nu ett nytt behov och söker därför en konsult och kollega med nedan kvalifikationer. Tjänsten är en del av vår konsultverksamhet vilket innebär att du blir anställd av oss och arbetar hos kund alt. interna projekt och åtaganden.

 **Din profil (Skall krav)**  

* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Stor erfarenhet av Cloud, Docker och Kubernetes
* Erfarenhet av Rust eller Python för backend och JavaScript/TypeScript för frontend
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med generativ AI är meriterande
* Kunskaper inom IT-säkerhet
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska

  

**Sista ansökningdatum:** 30-04-2026 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.


En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.


Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.


Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?


Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.


Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.


Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?  

  

*Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.*

title: Senior Supervisor - Front Office
description:
Vi på Grand Hôtel letar just nu efter en Senior Supervisor som kan ta plats i vårt Front Office-team, en grupp bestående av cirka 30 medarbetare. På Grand Hôtel är varje dag unik, och du som Senior Supervisor är en central person gällande gästupplevelser och för personalens utveckling.

**OM ROLLEN**


Vi letar efter en erfaren och engagerad Senior Supervisor som vill ta ansvar för driften och ledningen av vår reception tillsammans med Front Office Manager samt tre ytterligare Senior Supervisors. Inom Front Office strävar vi efter att leverera en skräddarsydd femstjärnig service och skapa minnesvärda upplevelser till alla våra gäster. Som Senior Supervisor blir du en nyckelperson som genom att coacha och utveckla personalen säkerställer att vi varje dag når våra mål om komplett gästnöjdhet. Din roll omfattar allt från smidig in- och utcheckning till daglig problemlösning samt handledning av receptionister och supervisors. Beslutsamhet och god struktureringsförmåga är avgörande för att framgångsrikt leda teamet och hantera eventuella utmaningar.


Arbetstiderna är förlagda till veckans alla dagar inklusive kvällar och helger enligt ett rullande schema.

**Dina ansvarsområden inkluderar:**

* Ansvar för att varje gästupplevelse är präglad av femstjärnig service och överensstämmer med satta standards
* Operativt ansvara för driften och att säkerställa rutiner och uppföljning
* Ledarskap med fokus på coachning och teamets välbefinnande

**VEM ÄR DU?**


Vi letar efter en driven medarbetare med passion för gästbemötande och service i världsklass. Noggrannhet, flexibilitet och en brinnande entusiasm för guest service är ett måste för att trivas i denna roll. Vidare ser vi även att du har:

* Minst tre års erfarenhet från en roll med ledaransvar
* Minst fyra års erfarenhet av arbete i hotellreception
* Erfarenhet av hotellsystemet Opera Cloud
* Talar mycket god svenska och engelska, ytterligare språkkunskaper är meriterande
* Utbildning inom Hotel Management/Hospitality samt internationell erfarenhet är meriterande

**VI ERBJUDER**


Vi erbjuder inte bara en roll utan en möjlighet att vara en del av en exceptionell gästupplevelse där varje dag är en ny möjlighet att skapa magi. Hos oss får du inte bara chansen att vara en del av ett välrenommerat team utan också möjligheten att växa och utvecklas inom företaget.

* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning på 100 %. Vi tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning.
* En spännande utmaning och stimulerande arbete i ett Sveriges mest ikoniska hotell med över 300 anställda.
* En internationell arbetsplats med en levande kultur och stor mångfald bland både kollegor och gäster
* Arbetsplatsen är placerad på hotellet där vi har högt i tak och en stor variation i arbetsuppgifter
* Lön och tillträde enligt överenskommelse


Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen utför vi bakgrundskontroller. Vi motser din ansökan senast 31/5-2026.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
### **About Univrses**


Univrses is a Stockholm-based 3D Computer Vision and AI company. We provide the perception and spatial awareness necessary for an increasingly autonomous world. While our roots are in the automotive sector, we have pioneered a new category: Infrastructure Intelligence. Our 3DAI system transforms ordinary vehicles into sophisticated mobile sensors, providing road authorities across Europe (Sweden, UK, Italy, and beyond) with real-time, actionable insights. We are shifting city management from reactive repairs to proactive, data-driven maintenance—saving costs, reducing CO2 emissions, and improving public safety.

### **The Role**


In your new developer role, you will take part in building the **3DAI City platform**. It is a scalable answer to the growing demand for data about the urban environment and part of our efforts in smart city development. You will play an important role in designing, building and scaling the platform. 3DAI City is still a young product and you will have a lot to contribute and freedom to shape the project.

* You will be responsible for growing our platform for storing, processing and visualizing data.
* You will use your experience to design efficient solutions for our backend and frontend systems.
* You will have the opportunity to create innovative technologies that will change people's lives and transform the world into a better place

### **Who you are**

* You have at least 3+ years of experience in Fullstack software development using Node.js and Typescript on the backend, and React (Vite SPA) on the frontend.
* You are experienced with AWS cloud platform development.
* You have excellent general understanding of REST APIs and GraphQL.
* You are comfortable taking high-level front-end designs and turning that into readable, maintainable, best-practice React code.
* You can build web-services from high level specifications, including figuring out database schemas, security considerations, logging and monitoring, and how best to scale out deployments to handle lots of users and data.
* You have an enthusiasm to tackle large-scale data challenges, with prior experience on high-performance analytic databases as a bonus.
* You like working in a team and sharing your knowledge. You are open to giving advice and listening to feedback.
* You are passionate about writing high-quality code and care for ensuring code validity by writing unit and integration tests.
* You keep up-to-date with best practices and new technologies.
* You have an aspiration to see your ideas move into production.

##### **Bonus points**


You have experience working with any of these systems or technologies:

* Serverless computing (e.g. AWS Lambdas)
* Familiar to infrastructure as code technologies such as Docker, AWS Cloudformation/CDK
* Geo spatial tools and databases such as PostGIS
* MUI (Material-UI) based front-end components
* E2E testing frameworks like Playwright

### **What’s in it for You?**


We provide the environment and the tools for you to do the best work of your career.

* **Responsibility**: Become a true stakeholder in a small team where your work actually matters.
* **Professional Evolution**: You will be working on exciting projects involving game-changing technology with an opportunity to improve the world through autonomy and intelligence
* **The "Work-Life" Blend**: Enjoy flexible work hours and a culture that values output over "desk time".
* **Upsides**: A secure Pension Plan and Wellness activities for up to 5 000 SEK per year paid by the company.
* **The Univrses Culture**:


	+ *Monday Momentum*: Kick off the week with team breakfast.
	+ *Thursday Knowledge*: Weekly Lunch & Learns where internal or external speakers present interesting topics, while the company pays for and caters the lunch to keep your technical and commercial skills sharp.
	+ *Friday Wind-down*: Celebrate the week’s wins with our Friday After Work sessions (free beer from our well-curated beer fridge!)
	+ *The Workspace*: A bright, collaborative office in Stockholm equipped with the essentials (yes, including the mandatory startup ping-pong table).

#### **Are You Our Next Full Stack Engineer?**


If you are a driven, creative strategist ready to shape the future of autonomous systems, we want to hear from you.


To apply, please include the following:

* Your CV
* A link to your LinkedIn profile
* A brief introduction (tell us about a time you turned a challenging customer situation into a success).

**Note**: All application materials must be in English.

title: Product Owner - Platform Integration Smart Tools
description:
Do you enjoy working where smart technology actually makes a difference for customers?


This role is right where tools, data, and digital platforms come together at Sandvik Coromant. If being part of what’s next sounds appealing, you’ll feel at home here.

 **About the job**


As Product Owner for Platform Integration Smart Tools, the focus is on bringing two leading technologies – Spike and CoroTurn⁺ – together into one scalable platform within Sandvik Coromant. Based at pro-micron within Smart Tools, the role combines strategic direction with hands-on execution in close collaboration with Digital Business, R&D, Sales, and Business Development.

  

The role starts as an individual contributor with a strong coordination and staff focus, with clear potential to grow into a broader product leadership position over time.

  

In this role, you:

* Drive the platform vision and target architecture for integrated smart tool solutions
* Shape and own the product roadmap across hardware, software, cloud, and data services
* Manage and prioritize the product backlog, turning direction into epics and user stories
* Align stakeholders across teams, companies, and locations
* Assess technical concepts to support compatibility, scalability, and future readiness
* Identify high‑value use cases and contribute to value propositions and business models
 **Location and flexibility**


You can be based in Münich, Germany, or in Sweden (Sandviken or Stockholm).

 **Your profile**


A strong technical foundation combined with a commercial and strategic mindset sets you up for success. Moving between big‑picture thinking and practical execution feels natural. Clear communication comes naturally, and you’re comfortable facilitating discussions that help teams align and move forward. Coordinating people and priorities across functions is part of how you work, and leading in matrix organizations through collaboration and influence feels natural.

  

This role suits you if you have:

* A degree in mechatronics, electrical engineering, computer science, industrial engineering, or similar
* Experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or System Architect
* Solid knowledge of sensor technology, embedded software, and cloud or data platforms
* Experience with integrated hardware‑software solutions and digital or IoT‑based offerings
* A good understanding of how digital products create customer value and can be monetized
* Experience contributing to business models such as data‑driven services or combined HW/SW offerings
 **Some words about us**


Smart Tools is a strategic focus area at Sandvik Coromant, where digital innovation meets world‑leading machining expertise. Teams in Kaufbeuren and Trondheim work closely with Digital Business and global stakeholders to turn sensor data into actionable insights. Together, we enable safer, smarter, and more sustainable manufacturing — and we do it by setting the pace for the entire industry.

 **Our culture**


Innovation is in our DNA and we’re proud to shape the future of manufacturing in close collaboration with our customers and partners. We believe in an inclusive, equal and open-minded culture, and we nurture our diversities to form a solid foundation for achieving great results. Add fair and rewarding benefits, as well as many different career opportunities in an inspiring global environment. Meet some of your future colleagues at our career page or visit our website, LinkedIn or Facebook page to get to know us further.

 **Contact information**


Are you curious to know more about this position? Please contact Michael Otto, hiring manager, michael.otto@sandvik.com.

  

We’ve already decided on which advertising channels and marketing campaigns we wish to use and respectfully decline any additional contacts in that matter.

  

Union contacts (Sweden):

* Thomas Lilja, Unionen, +46 (0)70-261 04 82
* Tord Engström, Akademikerföreningen, +46 (0)76 106 62 87
* Peter Olsson-Andrée, Ledarna, +46 (0)70-222 48 55
  

Recruitment Specialist: Anton Karlsson

 **How to apply**


Send your application no later than May 8th, 2026. Click apply and include your resume and cover letter in English. Please note that we don’t accept applications by e-mail. Job ID: R0090758.

  

To learn more about our recruitment process, please visit our career site or contact HR Services at hrservices.sweden@sandvik.com

 *Sandvik**Coromant**is part of the global industrial engineering group Sandvik and is at the forefront of developing manufacturing tools and machining solutions, with knowledge that drives the industry standards and innovations demanded by the metalworking industry now and in the next industrial era. Collaborations with educational institutions, extensive investment in research and development and strong customer partnership ensure the development of machining technologies that change,**lead**and drive the future of manufacturing. Sandvik**Coromant**owns over 1700 patents worldwide, employs around 8000 staff and is represented in more than 150 countries.*

Box 510, SE-101 30 Stockholm, Sweden

title: Designer (VIK)
description:
**Designer (VIK)**
------------------


Hos Bellbird får du möjligheten att jobba med, och utveckla, några av Nordens mest spännande och innovativa varumärken. Vi erbjuder en kreativ roll där du är med och formar kundernas visuella värld och paketera attraktivt innehåll med högsta kvalitet. Vi söker dig med ett kreativt sinne och känsla för design och produktion som vill ta nästa steg i karriären. Vi erbjuder en framåtlutad organisation med en växande studio som befinner sig i en expansiv fas.

##### **Om rollen**


I rollen som designer hos oss får du möjligheten att arbeta och bli en del av Bellbird Studio – ett team på åtta personer bestående av grafiska designers och produktionsledare. Vi har många olika erfarenheter i teamet och jobbar idag som studio väldigt brett – allt från stora visuella identitetsuppdrag och varumärkesplattformer, till löpande produktion. I rollen kommer du både få vara med och utveckla nya, samt förvalta befintliga visuella identiteter för våra kunder. Detta genom att designa och producera rapporter, presentationer, tryckmaterial, content till SoMe, webbar, filmer och animeringar samt annat grafiskt material. Du kommer till en snabbväxande och entreprenöriell miljö, där du får stort utrymme att utvecklas inom rollens alla områden och påverka byråns fortsatta tillväxtresa.

##### **Kvalifikationer**

*Vi söker dig som har/är:*

* En stark portfolio
* 1–3 års erfarenhet av grafisk design/kommunikation
* Ett kreativt sinne och känsla för design
* En bred verktygslåda och vill utveckla visuella koncept
* En lagspelare som gillar att arbete i grupp
* Grundläggande förståelse för utveckling av visuella identiteter och en stark vilja att lära sig mer
* En problemlösare som ser utmaningar som spännande och utvecklande
* Effektiv användning av relevanta designproblem inom Creative Cloud och Microsoft Office-paketet, inklusive Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro, PowerPoint och Word.

Det är meriterande om du, utöver grundläggande förutsättningar inom yrket, besitter någon/några av dessa kompetenser: 3D-visualisering, motion graphics, webbutveckling, filmredigering, eller har erfarenhet av verktyg så som Google Enterprise.

 **Omfattning**: Heltid 100%

**Anställningsform**: Vikariat för föräldraledighet, 12–18 månader, med god chans till fortsättning.
  

**Språkkrav**: Flytande i tal och skrift - svenska och engelska
  

**Plats**: På plats - Artillerigatan 49, Stockholm
  

**Startdatum**: Hösten 2026

*Varmt välkommen att ansöka genom att skicka in ditt CV och portfolio, samt skriv några rader om dig själv.* *Sista ansökningsdag är den* ***17e maj*** *men vi ser över urvalet löpande - så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt!*

title: Senior Platform Engineer
description:
Forget traditional consulting. Everone is looking for **Platform Engineers** who want to break the mold — building real impact through startups, sharp assignments, and the new AI-driven paradigm of agent-based systems.

#### **About Everone**


Everone is a tech consulting company providing software engineering and AI expertise to companies across the Nordic market.


But we’re not here to play by the old rules.


With a disruptive approach, we challenge the traditional and often conservative consulting model — replacing it with something more modern, transparent, and real. A way of working where people actually have influence, where collaboration beats hierarchy, and where freedom isn’t just a buzzword.


Right now, we’re in the middle of a major shift.  

A new paradigm driven by AI is changing everything — how systems are built, how businesses operate, and what it even means to be a developer.


We don’t just acknowledge this shift — we embrace it.


At Everone, you’ll have the opportunity to work with some of the most exciting and challenging assignments on the market, while being part of building what comes next. From modern software development to AI-driven and agent-based solutions, we see massive opportunities — for our clients, for the industry, and for every individual who wants to stay ahead.


Our flexible model for compensation and benefits, combined with a strong belief in ownership, transparency, and continuous growth, is a core part of what makes us different.


We’re building a company for what’s next — not what used to be.

***Today, we partner with some of the most attractive and innovative tech companies on the Swedish market — organizations that are pushing boundaries, investing heavily in AI, and redefining their industries. That means you won’t just be part of the shift — you’ll be working right at the center of it.***

#### **Why Everone?**


Because you don’t want to be just another consultant in just another company.


You want to be part of something that’s actually moving — a modern, fast-growing consulting company built for what’s next, not what used to be. A place where you’re not just along for the ride, but part of shaping it.


We’re operating right in the middle of a major shift.  

AI is redefining how products are built, how companies operate, and how value is created — and we’re leaning into it, not away from it.


At Everone, you’ll work on some of the most challenging assignments on the market, together with some of the most innovative and forward-leaning tech companies in Sweden. This is where new ideas are tested, new technologies are adopted, and real change is happening.


You won’t just follow the evolution of the industry —  

you’ll be part of driving it.

#### **Who are you?**


You’re a passionate **Platform Engineer** who wants to work in a modern, tech-driven environment with flexibility and freedom.


You enjoy collaborating in teams, taking ownership, and approaching problems with an open mind. Creating real value for users and customers is at the core of how you work, and you’re comfortable working close to the business and its stakeholders.


Maybe you’re just starting to explore the consulting world — or maybe you’ve been in it for a while and are ready for something new. Either way, that’s not what matters most to us.


What matters is that you’re a skilled developer with a few years of experience, driven by curiosity and a genuine interest in modern tech companies. You want to build things that make a difference — and help businesses grow.

#### **Your experience**

* Several years of experience building and running platforms or infrastructure for development
* Strong understanding of container-based environments and orchestration (e.g. Kubernetes)
* Experience working in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP or similar)
* Built and improved CI/CD pipelines used by multiple teams
* Hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code and automation at scale
* Solid understanding of observability (logs, metrics, tracing) and production environments
* Experience improving developer experience and reducing friction in development workflows
* Comfortable working cross-functionally with developers, architects, and business stakeholders
* Ability to take ownership of the bigger picture – from idea to working platform
* Understands the connection between technology, delivery speed, and business value

#### **Bonus (nice to have)**

* Experience building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP)
* Worked with security, identity, and secrets management in cloud environments
* Interest in standardization, platform-as-a-product, and self-service
* Experience driving change, setting direction, or taking a lead role
* Enjoys sharing knowledge (internally or externally)

title: Senior Cloud Architect
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Vi söker en Cloud Architect som vill ta molnlösningar till nästa nivå med Amazon Web Services (AWS) eller Google Cloud Platform (GCP). Hos oss får du arbeta med det senaste inom säkerhet, infrastruktur, DevSecOps, generativ AI och agentisk AI – och vara med och skapa lösningar som påverkar miljoner människor världen över. I rollen blir du en nyckelperson som förvandlar idéer till verklighet. Du kommer att leda strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, inspirera kunder och agera som deras trusted advisor, delta i molnkonferenser, bidra i pre-sales och nätverka med våra partners Amazon, Microsoft och Google.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder karriärmöjligheter i världsklass, projekt inom exempelvis självkörande bilar, livräddande robotar, autonoma system och framtidens AI-lösningar. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team som värdesätter innovation och samarbete – med månatliga aktiviteter och en kultur där vi har kul tillsammans. Vi letar efter fler kollegor som vill hänga med på vår AWS-resa till vårt kontor i Stockholm.
   

  

 Vi arbetar med tekniker som AWS Bedrock, Amazon Q, AWS Quick Suite, AWS Lambda, AWS Control Tower och programmeringsspråk som Java, Python, Node, React, Angular, TypeScript, Kafka, Golang, Kotlin, Terraform och Ansible.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.
* Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.


**Din profil**
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet av molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Erfarenhet som molnarkitekt eller av att leda molntransformationer.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* Mycket goda kunskaper i AWS services.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.


**Ansökan**
 Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
 Till denna roll söker vi medarbetare för säkerhetsklassat uppdrag placerad hos kund.
   

  

 Hos våra kunder arbetar vi i leveranser som kan ha bland annat #AWS, #GCP, #Google, Azure, AliCloud, Java, Go/Golang, Python, Kotlin, Node, HTML, TypeScript, JavaScript, CSS, Java, CloudFormation, Terraform, Docker, Kafka, React, Angular, Vue, Bash, Spring, GenAI, GraphQL, Backstage, Kubernetes, LLM, RAG, Copilot, GitHub Actions, SonarQube, BlackDuck, Apache Beam, Kong, Jenkins, Apigee, OpenShift, Ansible, DevSecOps, cloud architecture, cloud assessments, integration, Snowflake, Elastic Search, Grafana, Kibana, Splunk, Databricks, HelmChart, CloudFoundry.
   

  

 #Innovation #creativity #future #careers #AWS
   

  

**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real |** 
 www.capgemini.com

title: Platform Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 As a
 **Platform Engineer** 
 at Legora, you’ll join an enabling team focused on making life easier for developers. Your mission: improve reliability, boost performance, and build a rock-solid platform that scales with the company. You'll work hands-on across infrastructure and backend systems, helping teams ship faster, safer, and smarter.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Build the core infrastructure and reliability abstractions that all our engineering teams use
* Sit with all teams and help them structure their SRE efforts: observability, alerting, fault tolerance and reliability
* Proactively monitor our infrastructure and develop it for hyperscale and reliability
* Contribute to incident response and post-incident learning
* Work with Pulumi on primarily Azure, but also AI deployments on AWS and GCP


**Who You Are**
* You have years of experience as a backend engineer but have solid infrastructure, observability, monitoring know-how
* Experience with Kubernetes
* Experience with Pulumi (preferred) or similar IaC tools like AWS CDK, Terraform
* But most importantly, you are someone who
+ “Gets stuff done” and understands building a $10bn company isn’t always glamorous and takes hard work and long hours
+ Proactively and independently solves the most burning problems
+ Strives in a fast-paced environment where the answers aren’t always clear and processes are few


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Data Scientist - Finance
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re looking for a business-savvy data scientist to build and scale financial analytics, from data models and metrics frameworks to forecasting and strategic insights. You’ll turn product and business data into clear decisions, partner closely with Finance, Data, and Engineering, and support executive reporting and fundraising with reliable models, dashboards, and analysis.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* A business-minded data scientist excited to level up our financial analytics by building metrics frameworks and data models.
* Ability to move seamlessly between exploratory analysis, behavioral modeling, hypothesis testing, and strategic recommendations.
* Experience creating production-level data models with strong testing, and clear ownership across pipelines.
* Solid technical foundation (SQL, Python, statistical analysis) - comfortable working with data at scale and translating it into insights.
* Deep curiosity about user behavior and what actually drives growth and retention
* Expertise in financial modeling, forecasting, and scenario analysis (P&L, cash flow, unit economics).


**What You’ll Do**
* Partner with the Finance team to build and maintain financial projections, decision analyses, and long-range plans
* Work closely with data and engineering teams to leverage product and business data for deeper financial insights, cohort analysis, and predictive modeling
* Analyze funnels, cohorts, and user behaviors to surface insights that drive decisions
* Build dashboards, alerts, and automated reporting to keep the team informed and aligned
* Monitor data quality and collaborate with engineering to maintain reliability
* Translate complex financial data into clear narratives for executive and board audiences
* Support fundraising and strategic initiatives with ad-hoc financial analysis and data room preparation


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, , infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How We Hire**
* Fill out a short form and hop on a quick intro call with our recruiting team
* Walk through past work and real examples of your process
* Show us your Most Impressive Project
* Cross-functional interviews to meet more team members


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Sr. Business Development Representative
description:
Genesys empowers organizations of all sizes to improve loyalty and business outcomes by creating the best experiences for their customers and employees. Through Genesys Cloud, the AI-powered Experience Orchestration platform, organizations can accelerate growth by delivering empathetic, personalized experiences at scale to drive customer loyalty, workforce engagement, efficiency and operational improvements.
   

  

 We employ more than 6,000 people across the globe who embrace empathy and cultivate collaboration to succeed. And, while we offer great benefits and perks like larger tech companies, our employees have the independence to make a larger impact on the company and take ownership of their work. Join the team and create the future of customer experience together.
   

  

 Are you naturally curious to explore new technologies and share their benefits with others? Are you keen to become an empathetic consultant, a real trusted advisor and Genesys ambassador? Are you always ready to jump on an ease and personalized conversation by using multithreading across email, voice, LinkedIn, video, etc. channels?
   

  

 We are seeking a commercially driven
 **Senior Business Development Representative (Snr BDR)** 
 to drive pipeline growth across the
 **Nordic region** 
 , with a primary focus on
 **Denmark and Sweden** 
 .
   

  

 This role is responsible for owning both
 **inbound and outbound pipeline generation** 
 , supporting enterprise and upper mid-market accounts, and partnering closely with cross-functional teams to accelerate revenue growth. The ideal candidate combines strong prospecting expertise with commercial awareness and a deep understanding of Nordic business culture.
   

  

 This is a high-impact role for someone who thrives in a collaborative, performance-driven environment and is motivated by building meaningful enterprise opportunities.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Own pipeline generation across Denmark and Sweden through a balanced mix of strategic outbound prospecting and inbound lead management
* Develop and execute targeted outbound account strategies aligned to territory plans and regional revenue priorities
* Qualify and convert marketing-generated leads into high-quality sales opportunities
* Research, map, and engage key decision-makers within enterprise and upper mid-market organizations
* Partner closely with Account Executives to support account planning, whitespace identification, and multi-threaded engagement strategies
* Collaborate with Marketing on regional campaigns, events, ABM initiatives, and follow-up execution
* Work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, Alliances, and Channel teams to identify expansion signals and new opportunities
* Clearly articulate the value of Genesys’ cloud and AI-driven CX solutions aligned to customer digital transformation initiatives
* Generate consistent, high-quality pipeline aligned to regional revenue targets
* Maintain disciplined CRM documentation, activity tracking, and accurate reporting in Salesforce
* Provide structured market feedback on trends, customer priorities, and competitive insights within the Nordic market
* Consistently meet and exceed KPIs related to meetings booked, pipeline generated, and opportunity conversion


**Minimum Qualifications:**
* 3–5 years of experience in a BDR, SDR, or Inside Sales role within SaaS, CX, cloud, or technology environments
* Proven success in outbound prospecting and pipeline generation within enterprise or upper mid-market accounts
* Experience managing both inbound and outbound lead flows
* Native-level fluency in Danish or Swedish (required)
* Professional fluency in English
* Strong understanding of Nordic business culture and consultative sales environments
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Strong organizational skills and CRM discipline
* Experience using Salesforce, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, and modern sales engagement platforms
* Collaborative mindset with the ability to work effectively across multiple GTM functions


**Why Join Genesys?**
* Join a global leader in AI-driven customer experience technology
* Play a key role in expanding a strategically important Nordic market
* Competitive compensation with performance-based incentives
* Clear career progression pathways within a global sales organization
* Collaborative and high-performing team environment


 If a Genesys employee referred you, please use the link they sent you to apply.
   

  

**About Genesys:**
 Genesys® empowers more than 8,000 organizations worldwide to create the best customer and employee experiences. With agentic AI at its core, Genesys Cloud™ is the AI-Powered Experience Orchestration platform that connects people, systems, data and AI across the enterprise. As a result, organizations can drive customer loyalty, growth and retention while increasing operational efficiency and teamwork across human and AI workforces. To learn more, visit www.genesys.com.
   

  

**Reasonable Accommodations:**
 If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in your ability to access or use this online application and need an alternative method for applying, you or someone you know may contact us at reasonable.accommodations@genesys.com.
   

  

 You can expect a response within 24–48 hours. To help us provide the best support, click the email link above to open a pre-filled message and complete the requested information before sending. If you have any questions, please include them in your email.
   

  

 This email is intended to support job seekers requesting accommodations. Messages unrelated to accommodation—such as application follow-ups or resume submissions—may not receive a response.
   

  

**Genesys is an equal opportunity employer committed to fairness in the workplace. We evaluate qualified applicants without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, marital status, domestic partner status, national origin, genetics, disability, military and veteran status, and other protected characteristics.**
